Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Cassias]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Cassias is a member of the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Cassias is Eithan's cousin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Cassias has gold hair like fresh wheat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Cassias wears a silver bracer on his right forearm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Cassias wears deep blue silk shirt and pants stitched with silver thread.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Cassias is traveling with Lindon and Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Cassias operates a control panel for a training course.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Cassias can inject madra speckled with silver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — Cassias mentions the cost of a pill is about five thousand scales.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Lindon took Cassias' advice to stay out of the barn during landing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Cassias can activate a collection script to power the house.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Cassias was born to be Patriarch of the Arelius family.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Cassias works at a control panel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Cassias has bloodline powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 11''' — Cassias's voice was weak.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — Cassias follows Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 12''' — Cassias felt a fist clench his gut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Cassias is a sword artist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Cassias is a genius of the Arelius family and its heir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 15''' — Cassias felt his soul was numb and his limbs were trembling after exhausting his madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Cassias runs the Striker Trial.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Cassias can empower spears with his sword madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 16''' — Cassias did not expect Eithan back for weeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Cassias is the father of a three-year-old son.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Cassias's wife is a member of the imperial Naru clan and is a Highgold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — Cassias is a Highgold.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Cassias is coming to Sky's Mercy to retrieve Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Cassias is the second-ranked Highgold in the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Cassias uses the Silver Step technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 8''' — Cassias was over the shoulder of a female character during a fall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Cassias is an injured individual being led by a Skysworn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 10''' — Cassias can point out a Truegold on a map.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 11''' — Cassias is covered in bandages and has a frog's tongue stuck to his wrist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 15''' — Cassias trained Yerin.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Cassias is a Truegold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Cassias has expanded spiritual sense and bloodline powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 11''' — Cassias possesses a Thousand-Mile Cloud.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Cassias and his wife moved to greet the group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Cassias was standing at the railing taking shots at distant enemies.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 8''' — Cassias has the ability to see more than anyone else can.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 21''' — Cassias is a character who stood with Lindon overlooking the exodus from the Nethergate.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
